editor.title: Staff slots
editor.desc: Split this ticket into dated work slots — one per staff member (e.g. morning and evening).
editor.empty: No staff slots yet. Add one to dispatch a staff member.
editor.end_before_start: End must be on or after start.
editor.no_eligible: No eligible staff for this building
editor.field_note_placeholder: Optional instructions for this staff member
editor.remove_dialog_body: The staff slot is removed. You can add it again later.
agenda.page_subtitle: Your dated work slots. Mark each one done or report if you can't complete it.
agenda.empty_desc: When a manager assigns you a dated slot, it appears here.
complete.dialog_desc: Add a completion note and/or photos as proof of work. At least one is required. This does not close the ticket — your manager reviews it.
complete.photo_hint: Images only (jpg, png, webp, heic). Max 10 MB each.
complete.photo_too_large: Each photo must be 10 MB or smaller.
complete.evidence_required: Add a completion note or at least one photo.
unable.dialog_desc: Tell your manager why this slot can't be completed. A reason is required.
subtasks.empty_slots: No staff slots in this sub-task yet.
subtasks.remove_dialog_body: Its staff slots return to the General group — nothing is lost. No staff assignment or its completion evidence is deleted.
subtasks.auto_complete_label: Auto-complete when all sub-tasks are done
subtasks.auto_complete_desc: When every sub-task is done, the ticket auto-advances to manager review.
subtasks.auto_complete_pa_only: Only a provider admin can change this setting.
